## Tests
- [ ] `dotnet build` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] Relevant automated tests were added or updated
- [ ] Manual smoke test was run for the changed behavior

## Safety checks
- [ ] Source music folder remains read-only
- [ ] Copy operations stay within the configured source root and device root rules
- [ ] Delete operations only affect files on the detected device
- [ ] No raw exception text is shown in the UI
- [ ] No child-facing UI exposes unnecessary raw file-system paths

## UI / UX checks
- [ ] Visible changes were reviewed for readability and layout
- [ ] Dangerous actions are clearly distinguished
- [ ] Confirmation is required for destructive actions
- [ ] Wording is plain-language and child-friendly
